creator: brian@awfulhak.org
text:
> Synopsis: ppp server doc submission
> 
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: brian->freebsd-doc
> Responsible-Changed-By: hoek
> Responsible-Changed-When: Mon Apr 13 08:43:00 PDT 1998
> Responsible-Changed-Why: 
> Prev. responsible was going to merge this into the handbook "soon".  That
> hasn't happened.  Let's see if we can convince someone else to do this.
> Should be almost as simple as "cvs add"....

A lot of functionality has been added to ppp such as optional forth 
columns in ppp.secret and dynamic IP assignment.  I haven't read 
through this document, but I'll bet it doesn't cover this stuff.

Whoever takes this should read the man page fully before submitting.
-- 
Brian <brian@Awfulhak.org>, <brian@FreeBSD.org>, <brian@OpenBSD.org>
      <http://www.Awfulhak.org>
Don't _EVER_ lose your sense of humour....
